content: A curiosity-driven active learning agent (2024-2025 SOTA) can route high-uncertainty, high-novelty explored memory traces directly to an online meta-learning consolidation pipeline that prioritizes them for interleaved replay, proactively mitigating catastrophic forgetting by aligning what the agent intrinsically wants to remember with what the consolidation system needs to retain.
source_topics: Online meta-learning memory consolidation with catastrophic forgetting mitigation
